Lines.FullText: - ID: The unit ID as defined in Codes for Units of Measurement used in International Trade.

Elements.RawText: - ID: The unit ID as defined in Codes for Units of Measurement used in International Trade.

Lines.FullText: Should be set to -1 if the unit ID is not available.

Elements.RawText: Should be set to -1 if the unit ID is not available.

Lines.FullText: - Symbol: The symbol of the unit, i.e. "m/s". It is mandatory and must be set before the Unit object is frozen.

Elements.RawText: - Symbol: The symbol of the unit, i.e. "m/s". It is mandatory and must be set before the Unit object is frozen.

Lines.FullText: - Name: The full name of the unit, i.e. "meters per second". The unit's name is optional.

Elements.RawText: - Name: The full name of the unit, i.e. "meters per second". The unit's name is optional.

Lines.FullText: - Quantity: The quantity represented by the unit, i.e. "Velocity". The unit's quantity is optional.

Tags.RawText: @subsection unit_components Unit components * - ID: The unit ID as defined in Codes for Units of Measurement used in International Trade. * Should be set to -1 if the unit ID is not available. * - Symbol: The symbol of the unit, i.e. "m/s". It is mandatory and must be set before the Unit object is frozen. * - Name: The full name of the unit, i.e. "meters per second". The unit's name is optional. * - Quantity: The quantity represented by the unit, i.e. "Velocity". The unit's quantity is optional.
